query_name: 検証_個店需要予測_枠のばらつき
query_string:
drop table if exists l2_integration_datamart.analytics_demand_forecast_variance;
create table l2_integration_datamart.analytics_demand_forecast_variance as 

with agg_value as (
  select
    model
    , property_id
    , business_date || ' ' || lpad(cast(business_hour as varchar), 2, '0') || ':00:00' as time_slot
    /* 不足　*/
    , sum(if((entry_slot < (td1 + td2 + td3)) and entry_slot > 0, (forecast_value + lossopps_value))) as short__forecast_value
    , sum(if((entry_slot < (td1 + td2 + td3)) and entry_slot > 0, treatment_minutes)) as short__treatment_value
    /* 余剰 */
    , sum(if(entry_slot > (td1 + td2 + td3), (forecast_value + lossopps_value))) as surplus__forecast_value
    , sum(if(entry_slot > (td1 + td2 + td3), treatment_minutes)) as surplus__treatment_value
    /* 適正 */
    , sum(if((entry_slot = (td1 + td2 + td3)) and entry_slot > 0, (forecast_value + lossopps_value))) as appro__forecast_value
    , sum(if((entry_slot = (td1 + td2 + td3)) and entry_slot > 0, treatment_minutes)) as appro__treatment_value
  from
    l2_integration_datamart.analytics_demand_forecast
  where
    business_week >= '2026-02-02'
    and business_week <= '2026-03-09'
  group by
    1,2,3
)


select
  model
  , property_id
  , time_slot
  /* 不足　*/
  , short__forecast_value
  , short__treatment_value
  , short__treatment_value - short__forecast_value as short__vs_forecast
  /* 余剰 */
  , surplus__forecast_value
  , surplus__treatment_value
  , surplus__treatment_value - surplus__forecast_value as surplus__vs_forecast
  /* 適正 */
  , appro__forecast_value
  , appro__treatment_value
  , appro__treatment_value - appro__forecast_value as appro__vs_forecast
from
  agg_value
